description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly black body accented by metallic and copper-colored components. The central section houses a large, circular chamber with visible mechanical details and orange highlights, suggesting advanced technology or energy-based operation. The barrel is robust and metallic, with a multi-segmented structure and a prominent muzzle device at the front. Several tan-colored magazine-like elements are attached to the underside, and the grip area is ergonomically shaped for handling. The rear section includes a compact, angular stock and additional mechanical detailing. The overall appearance is that of a high-tech, possibly sci-fi weapon, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A futuristic black rifle with metallic and copper accents, featuring a large circular chamber, robust barrel, and multiple tan magazine elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular chamber, barrel opening, and symmetrical side details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length, barrel details, tan magazines, and mechanical rear section.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the compact stock and the back of the circular chamber.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing similar features to view 1, with clear visibility of the chamber and magazines.
